session.user:

Do NOT modify any files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/commands/ tests/core/ tests/packages/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40
Run pytest on commands, core, and packages tests

session.assistant:
**pytest failed: 1 issue found**
**Test:** tests/commands/admin/test_test_workflow.py::test_empty_commit_created_before_pr_creation
**Error:** The CLI command option `--plan` no longer exists; the help message suggests it should be `--pr` instead.
``` Error: No such option: --plan Did you mean --pr? ```
**Location:** tests/commands/admin/test_test_workflow.py:81
**Issue:** The test is using a deprecated CLI option `--plan` that has been renamed to `--pr`. The test needs to be updated to use the new option name, or the CLI command needs to be reverted to support `--plan`.
